case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES BDC VS ZIERAU MICHELLE C.AKA SEREP MICHELLE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES BDC AS TO DEFENDANT ZIERAU MICHELLE C.AKA SEREP MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZIERAU MICHELLE C.AKA SEREP MICHELLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES BDC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZIERAU MICHELLE C.AKA SEREP MICHELLE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER FROM ATTORNEY DOUGLAS TIBBITTS ABOUT BANKRUPTCY ON FILE.
